session.objective: Fix #2007: suppress scope-qualified deferral false positives in validate_session_json contradiction check

serenaActivated.evidence: Worked in isolated worktree per task brief; project context loaded via @-imported AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md plus .claude/rules at session start.

serenaInstructions.evidence: Retrieval-led reasoning followed: read .claude/rules canonical-source-mirror.md, ci-scripts.md, code-quality.md before editing the validator.

notOnMain.evidence: Branch is fix/2007-evidence-contradiction-multiline, created off main; commits never target main.

checklistComplete.evidence: All sessionStart and sessionEnd MUST gates populated with evidence drawn from this session.

handoffPreserved.evidence: HANDOFF.md was read only; this session made zero edits to .agents/HANDOFF.md.

serenaMemoryUpdated.evidence: Memory tasks/issue-2007-evidence-contradiction-multiline written via mcp__serena__write_memory with the fix design and verification.

markdownLintRun.evidence: Change touches only Python files (validator and tests), no markdown; markdown lint had no targets in scope this commit.

changesCommitted.evidence: scripts/validate_session_json.py and tests/test_validate_session_json.py committed atomically on this branch with conventional message referencing #2007.

validationPassed.evidence: 71 tests green via .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_validate_session_json.py; 97 neighbor tests green; full 667 session-log scan shows 0 newly flagged warnings.

workLog.detail: Read issue #2007, the validator, git blame on CONTRADICTION_PATTERNS (PR #1328), and the named session-log fixture; confirmed models.py holds no contradiction logic.
Evaluated three designs against a 26-case matrix and a 667-file scan. Chose parenthetical-or-trailing-note-after-affirmative suppression for deferred/pending only; canonical regex unchanged.
Added _token_in_parentheses, _is_scope_qualified, _has_contradiction; swapped the call site in validate_must_item from CONTRADICTION_PATTERNS.search to _has_contradiction.
Extended TestEvidenceContradiction with parametrized genuine-still-flags and scope-qualified-suppressed cases including both exact issue strings.
Validator on the issue fixture yields a clean pass; 667-file scan suppresses only genuine false positives, 0 newly flagged.

decisions.decision: Suppress only deferred/pending tokens, only when scope-qualified
decisions.rationale: Among the nine canonical tokens, only deferred/pending appear in honest multi-scope evidence. The other seven and bare/item-itself deferrals always flag, preserving genuine contradiction detection.

outcome.summary: validate_session_json contradiction check no longer fires on multi-scope deferred/pending evidence; canonical regex unchanged; 71 tests green, 0 regressions across 667 session logs.
